channel.title: Productivity on Junho Lee
channel.description: Recent content in Productivity on Junho Lee

item.title: 32 Slash Command Shortcuts That LLMs Instantly Understand
item.description: 32 slash commands that work out of the box with Claude, ChatGPT, and Gemini – no custom definitions needed. Categorized by use case with practical combination strategies.

item.title: macshot: A Native macOS Tool Emerging as an Alternative to Paid Apps
item.description: A look at macshot, a native open-source macOS screenshot and screen recording tool that delivers powerful features without the subscription burden.

item.title: Thinking Like an Agent Conductor in the AI Era
item.description: Even after adopting agents, if the work structure itself does not change, productivity does not scale. Reid Hoffman’s conductor strategy starts by breaking that illusion.

item.title: Overcoming NotebookLM's Generation Limits with Script-Based Control
item.description: When NotebookLM stops at 20 slides, most people just give up. Designate a single master script as the source and push through with code-style commands to generate 40 slides.

item.title: Cutting Through Claude Code Setup Confusion with Plugin Advisor
item.description: If you have ever stalled in front of the plugin list when first setting up Claude Code, Plugin Advisor narrows that entrance. Preset Packs and pre-flight checklists catch runtime errors before they happen.
